fields.title: Critical bKash liquidity shortage
fields.explanation: The projected bKash balance is expected to fall below the configured safety threshold.
fields.recommended_action: Add provider liquidity immediately and review recent cash-out activity.

fields.title: Unusual transaction velocity detected
fields.explanation: Several high-value cash-out transactions were recorded in a short period.
fields.recommended_action: Review the flagged transactions and contact the agent.

fields.title: Repeated transaction amount pattern
fields.explanation: Multiple transactions with similar amounts were detected.
fields.recommended_action: Verify whether the transactions represent genuine activity.

fields.title: Test alert
fields.explanation: Projected balance may fall below safety threshold
fields.recommended_action: Review immediately

fields.title: Cash dangerously low at Banani Supermarket
fields.explanation: Physical cash balance has dropped below 50% of the safety threshold. The agent may be unable to serve cash-out requests.
fields.recommended_action: Dispatch emergency cash replenishment. Contact the area supervisor immediately.

fields.title: Cash below safety threshold at Halishahar Mini Mart
fields.explanation: The agent's physical cash is below the configured safety threshold, indicating potential service disruption.
fields.recommended_action: Schedule a cash replenishment within the next 4 hours.

fields.title: Unusual transaction velocity detected at Dhanmondi Mart
fields.explanation: Transaction frequency is 3.2x above the 7-day rolling average for this time window. This may indicate structuring or smurfing activity.
fields.recommended_action: Review recent transaction log. If pattern persists, escalate to compliance.

fields.title: Moderate velocity spike at Daulatpur Digital Hub
fields.explanation: Transaction rate is 1.8x the expected baseline. Pattern is within monitoring thresholds but warrants observation.
fields.recommended_action: Monitor for the next 2 hours. No immediate action required.

fields.title: Repeated identical amounts at Mirpur DOHS Booth
fields.explanation: Multiple transactions of exactly ৳10000 within a 30-minute window from different customer IDs. Potential structuring activity.
fields.recommended_action: Flag for compliance review. Cross-reference customer IDs for links.

fields.title: Duplicate amount pattern at Banani Supermarket
fields.explanation: Three transactions of ৳15000 from the same customer within 2 hours. May be legitimate but flagged for review.
fields.recommended_action: Verify with the agent whether this is normal business activity.

fields.title: Stale balance data for Nagad at Nasirabad Corner
fields.explanation: Balance data for Nagad has not been refreshed for over 24 hours. The displayed balance may be inaccurate.
fields.recommended_action: Check API connectivity to Nagad. Trigger a manual data refresh.

fields.title: Conflicting balance reported for SureCash at Dhaka Central Mobile
fields.explanation: The provider API and reconciliation file report different balances. Discrepancy: ৳10000.
fields.recommended_action: Run a full reconciliation for this agent-provider pair.

fields.title: Provider float running low for bKash at Gulshan Plaza Counter
fields.explanation: The bKash float balance is approaching the safety threshold. Cash-in operations may be affected soon.
fields.recommended_action: Initiate a float top-up request to bKash.

fields.title: Extreme transaction burst at Agrabad Trade Hub
fields.explanation: Over 40 transactions processed in the last 15 minutes — 8x above the expected rate. Strong indicator of potential fraud or system error.
fields.recommended_action: Immediately suspend agent transactions and initiate investigation.

fields.recommended_action: Check API connectivity to SureCash. Trigger a manual data refresh.

fields.title: Conflicting balance reported for Rocket at Gulshan Plaza Counter
fields.explanation: The provider API and reconciliation file report different balances. Discrepancy: ৳5000.
fields.recommended_action: Run a full reconciliation for this agent-provider pair.

fields.title: Provider float running low for Nagad at Godnail Service Center
fields.explanation: The Nagad float balance is approaching the safety threshold. Cash-in operations may be affected soon.
fields.recommended_action: Initiate a float top-up request to Nagad.

fields.title: Extreme transaction burst at Agrabad Trade Hub
fields.explanation: Over 40 transactions processed in the last 15 minutes — 8x above the expected rate. Strong indicator of potential fraud or system error.
fields.recommended_action: Immediately suspend agent transactions and initiate investigation.
